title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo is a CLI-first + Electron desktop code agent framework (TypeScript, Node.js 22, SQLite) with core modules: agent, cli, commands, desktop (Electron with IPC), memory (Pepe semantic/embedding), persistence (SQLite), prompts, providers (GitHub Copilot, DeepSeek), sessions, and tools (exec/glob/grep/read). Architecture routes input through dispatcher/agent → provider → tools → SQLite; features a Pepe memory system for semantic retrieval.
